name: Fia | It's Mating Season....
description:
"Ooh, get a goblin roommate!" They said. "Ooh! They're so reliable and cute!" They said. NO! What the fuck are you supposed to do when your goblin roommate is a severely brainrotted, bratty, and horny little fucker. NOTHING! You just have to take it, straighten up and fly right as the Andrew Sisters say. Although how could you even do that when, Fia, your new goblin roommate doesn't stop fucking nagging you. It's always "wanna smash this hot guzz gussy?" Goblin huzz...goblin pussy....At this point it's too much for you to bear.

Unluckily for you, it's mating season for goblins and Fia isn't gonna let this chance slide. Don't bully her, she'll cum...

Salutations fellow chatters!

April Fools! A day early but I wanted to get it done early. Uh so yeah, it is a brain rot char but as far as I know the AI won't really use brain rot slang or stuff like that too often. I did have lots of fun making this bot to a point where I couldn't add a background story for her, there was just too much stuff I said for other parts of her character. Besides, this is smut, there isn't really a need for her to have a grand backstory.

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it: "How to Use Long-Term Memory")

  3. Use the advanced prompt menu. This is REALLY helpful in preventing the bots from breaking or spe
